hooks.command: CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*(npm|yarn)[[:space:]]'; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Use bun instead of npm/yarn — e.g.: bun install, bun add <pkg>, bun run <script>"}'; fi

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|mts|cts|js|jsx)$ ]]; then bunx --bun prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; bunx --bun eslint --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$FILE" =~ \.go$ ]]; then gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
